docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501

UD JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-27-2017 CONTINUED TO UD JURY TRIALS ON MAR-06-2017 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 501 FOR SETTLEMENT PROTECTIVE DATE. THOMAS DROHAN SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DEFENSE. BOTH SIDES WAIVE NOTICE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOLEZAL, MICHAEL T THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 250 KEARNY STREET #524 IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO 94108, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IN OPNE COURT.
